review_reason: Phase 2 blocked: succ_at_stage cannot be defined because discreteStagedBuild uses forward_temporal_witness_seed (no blocking formulas). Plan revision needed to either modify staged build OR switch to well-founded minimal successor approach.
summary: Phase 1 COMPLETED, Phase 2 PARTIAL. Stage embedding infrastructure complete. Blocking issue discovered: the current staged build doesn't use blocking formulas, so witnesses are not guaranteed to be immediate successors. Three resolution options identified in summary.

artifacts.summary: Stage-indexed timeline infrastructure (~460 lines): stage embeddings, LocallyFiniteOrder at each stage, immediateSuccPoint with blocking formulas
Implementation summary with Phase 1-2 progress and blocking issue analysis

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete. Phase 2 partial - stage embeddings complete but succ_at_stage blocked due to architectural mismatch between discreteStagedBuild (no blocking formulas) and discreteImmediateSuccSeed (with blocking formulas).

blocking_issue.description: discreteStagedBuild uses forward_temporal_witness_seed, not discreteImmediateSuccSeed with blocking formulas
resolution_options: Create new discreteStagedBuildImmediate with blocking formula seeds
Switch to Approach 2 (well-founded minimal successor) from research-006

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented stage-indexed timeline types and stage embedding infrastructure. Phase 2 blocked due to architectural mismatch: the current discreteStagedBuild doesn't use blocking formulas needed for immediate successor covering property. Plan revision needed.

next_steps: Revise plan to address blocking issue
Recommended: Switch to Approach 2 (well-founded minimal successor) from research-006
Alternative: Modify StagedExecution.lean to use discreteImmediateSuccSeed
